abilities.name: Flick of the Wrist
abilities.description: May use Grace in place of Might when making Melee or Pugilism attacks.

abilities.name: Harmless (Living)
abilities.description: Living characters must discard a card to target this character with an attack.

abilities.name: Puny
abilities.description: Minus 1 Wounds and may not make disengaging strikes.

actions: (1) Shin Kick (Pugilism) | AV: 2 (6) | Rg: y1 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 1/2/3 damage.
(1) Thrown Rock (Thrown Weapons) | AV: 3 (7) | Rg: z6 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 1/2/3 damage.
system.notes: Orphan gangs formed from children without caregivers, hardened by Malifaux's horrors. Survive by begging and stealing.
